name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability NEAT should gain.

---

## What you want

A clear description of the capability.

## Why it matters

What problem does this solve. Who is affected. What does the current workaround look like.

## Sketch

If you have a sense of the shape (new verb, new endpoint, schema addition, etc.), describe it. Code snippets welcome.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you weighed and why they fall short.
